title: MCP server over SQL — a JSON-RPC call is an ncurl POST (proven)
description: An MCP (Model Context Protocol) server call as a MANIFEST, zero TypeScript. MCP is JSON-RPC 2.0 over HTTP, so `initialize` / `tools/list` / `tools/call` is a ducknng_ncurl_table POST — verified live against a public MCP server (DeepWiki). The endpoint is the binding {mcp_url}; the host provisions ducknng + TLS. The session id `initialize` returns threads through as a header on the next call; only server-pushed SSE notifications use ducknng wss.

resolvers.title: SQL materialize
resolvers.description: Materialize a table from a read-only SELECT (an MCP JSON-RPC POST via ducknng_ncurl_table).
